mapper.sql: id, trace_id, task_id, document_id, parent_id, artifact_type, stage_code, file_name, file_ext, mime_type, storage_path, preview_path, file_size, checksum, page_no, page_range, sort_no, status, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
id, trace_id, task_id, step_code, step_name, step_type, input_artifact_ids, output_artifact_ids, config_json, status, error_message, started_at, ended_at, duration_ms, created_at
mapper.select: select from document_artifact where task_id = #{taskId} order by sort_no asc, created_at asc
select from document_artifact where trace_id = #{traceId} order by sort_no asc, created_at asc
select from document_artifact_step where task_id = #{taskId} order by started_at asc, created_at asc
select from document_artifact_step where trace_id = #{traceId} order by started_at asc, created_at asc
